metadata.description: oh-my-gajaecode — focused Gajae Code suite: 6 skills + 7 commands. Adaptive and no-English responses, SDK-v3 workflow ETA, external review, and read-only Codex delegation; optional runtimes fail closed when prerequisites are absent.

plugins.name: oh-my-gjc
plugins.description: oh-my-gajaecode — focused Gajae Code suite. Skills: adaptive-response, no-english, workflow-eta, extragoal, insane-review, lazycodex-gjc. Commands: /omg, /omg:setup, /omg:gate, /omg:gate-always, /omg:fable, /omg:insane-review, /omg:lazycodex-gjc. workflow-eta uses the read-only GJC SDK v3 bus; LazyCodex stays read-only and prerequisite-bound. models.yml remains untouched.
